first_attempt_pass.derivation: count of records where first attempt PASS

total_input_tokens.derivation: sum of prompt_tokens across Campaign 1 records

total_output_tokens.derivation: sum of completion_tokens across Campaign 1 records

x_to_opencl.derivation: wilson_ci for all X-to-opencl directions, L0 only

x_to_omp.derivation: wilson_ci for all X-to-omp directions, L0 only

cuda-to-omp.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=cuda-to-omp, L0 only

cuda-to-opencl.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=cuda-to-opencl, L0 only

omp-to-cuda.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=omp-to-cuda, L0 only

omp-to-omp_target.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=omp-to-omp_target, L0 only

omp-to-opencl.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=omp-to-opencl, L0 only

omp_target-to-omp.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=omp_target-to-omp, L0 only

opencl-to-cuda.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=opencl-to-cuda, L0 only

opencl-to-omp.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=opencl-to-omp, L0 only

cuda-to-omp_target.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=cuda-to-omp_target, L0 only

omp_target-to-cuda.derivation: wilson_ci(PASS count, total) for direction=omp_target-to-cuda, L0 only

opencl-to-cuda vs cuda-to-opencl.derivation: mcnemar_exact paired on (suite, kernel) for opencl-to-cuda vs cuda-to-opencl, L0 only

opencl-to-omp vs omp-to-opencl.derivation: mcnemar_exact paired on (suite, kernel) for opencl-to-omp vs omp-to-opencl, L0 only

omp_target-to-cuda vs cuda-to-omp_target.derivation: mcnemar_exact paired on (suite, kernel) for omp_target-to-cuda vs cuda-to-omp_target, L0 only

cuda-to-omp vs omp-to-cuda.derivation: mcnemar_exact paired on (suite, kernel) for cuda-to-omp vs omp-to-cuda, L0 only

omp-to-omp_target vs omp_target-to-omp.derivation: mcnemar_exact paired on (suite, kernel) for omp-to-omp_target vs omp_target-to-omp, L0 only

total_tasks.derivation: count of unique (source_spec, target_spec) tasks in Campaign 2

pass_at_1.derivation: fraction of tasks where at least 1 of 3 seeds passes

pass_at_3.derivation: fraction of tasks where all 3 seeds pass
